metadata.description: Batch 38 — additional Oxford 5000 words 701-800; source-aligned from attached PDF

words.definitionEn: to carry out a plan, instruction, or program
words.definitionTh: ดำเนินการ / ประหาร
words.example: Execute the inspection sequence after the safety check.

words.definitionEn: the act of carrying out a plan or instruction
words.definitionTh: การดำเนินการ
words.example: The execution of the trial followed the approved protocol.

words.definitionEn: to use physical or mental effort or influence
words.definitionTh: ออกแรง / ใช้
words.example: The clamp exerts force on the bracket.

words.definitionEn: the state of being forced to live away from home
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “exile”.

words.definitionEn: unusual and interesting because it is from a distant place
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “exotic”.

words.definitionEn: the process of becoming larger or more extensive
words.definitionTh: การขยายตัว
words.example: The design allows future system expansion.

words.definitionEn: an organized journey for research or exploration
words.definitionTh: การเดินทางสำรวจ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “expedition”.

words.definitionEn: money spent by a person or organization
words.example: Track capital expenditure for the project.

words.definitionEn: based on testing new ideas or methods
words.example: The team tested an experimental camera setup.

words.definitionEn: high-level skill or knowledge in a subject
words.definitionTh: ความเชี่ยวชาญ
words.example: The supplier provides machine-vision expertise.

words.definitionEn: to come to the end of a valid period
words.example: The calibration certificate will expire next month.

words.definitionEn: stated clearly and in detail
words.example: Use explicit acceptance criteria.

words.definitionEn: in a clear and direct way
words.definitionTh: อย่างชัดเจน
words.example: The procedure explicitly defines the limit.

words.definitionEn: to use something for advantage, sometimes unfairly
words.definitionTh: ใช้ประโยชน์
words.example: The algorithm exploits contrast differences.

words.definitionEn: the unfair use of people or resources for gain
words.definitionTh: การแสวงประโยชน์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “exploitation”.

words.definitionEn: able to explode; a substance that can explode
words.definitionTh: ระเบิดได้ / วัตถุระเบิด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “explosive”.

words.definitionEn: the state of being in contact with something
words.definitionTh: การสัมผัส / การเปิดรับ
words.example: Limit the sensor’s exposure to moisture.

words.definitionEn: an added part or the act of making something longer
words.definitionTh: การขยาย / ต่อเติม
words.example: Install a cable extension if required.

words.definitionEn: covering a large area, amount, or range
words.example: The team completed extensive testing.

words.definitionEn: over a large area or in great detail
words.definitionTh: อย่างกว้างขวาง
words.example: The model was extensively validated.

words.definitionEn: a concentrated substance; to remove or obtain something
words.definitionTh: สารสกัด / ดึงออก
words.example: Extract the defect records from the database.

words.definitionEn: a person holding extreme political or religious views
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “extremist”.

words.definitionEn: cloth or the basic structure of something
words.definitionTh: ผ้า / โครงสร้าง
words.example: Use a clean fabric cover.

words.definitionEn: extremely good or impressive
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “fabulous”.

words.definitionEn: to make a process easier or more likely
words.definitionTh: อำนวยความสะดวก
words.example: The dashboard facilitates faster decisions.

words.definitionEn: a smaller group within a larger organization
words.definitionTh: ฝ่าย / กลุ่ม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “faction”.

words.definitionEn: a teaching department or an ability
words.definitionTh: คณะ / ความสามารถ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “faculty”.

words.definitionEn: to gradually lose strength, color, or clarity
words.example: The printed mark may fade over time.

words.definitionEn: not successful in achieving the intended result
words.definitionTh: ที่ล้มเหลว
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “failed”.

words.definitionEn: equal and reasonable treatment
words.definitionTh: ความยุติธรรม
words.example: Use consistent scoring to ensure fairness.

words.definitionEn: not genuine; made to appear real
words.example: Reject any fake calibration certificate.

words.definitionEn: the state of being widely known
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “fame”.

words.definitionEn: an imagined situation or creative idea
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “fantasy”.

words.definitionEn: the money paid for a journey
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “fare”.

words.definitionEn: causing or likely to cause death
words.example: The risk assessment covers fatal hazards.

words.definitionEn: the events believed to control a person’s future
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “fate”.

words.definitionEn: helpful or giving an advantage
words.definitionTh: เอื้ออำนวย
words.example: The test produced favorable results.

words.definitionEn: an impressive achievement requiring skill
words.definitionTh: ความสำเร็จโดดเด่น
words.example: Detecting the tiny defect was a technical feat.

words.definitionEn: a serious crime under law
words.definitionTh: อาชญากรรมร้ายแรง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “felony”.

words.definitionEn: supporting equal rights for women; a person doing so
words.definitionTh: สตรีนิยม / นักสตรีนิยม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “feminist”.

words.definitionEn: a thin thread forming material or tissue
words.example: Inspect the fiber for contamination.

words.definitionEn: very strong, aggressive, or intense
words.example: The supplier faces fierce competition.

words.definitionEn: a person who directs or produces films
words.definitionTh: ผู้สร้างภาพยนตร์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “filmmaker”.

words.definitionEn: a device or process that removes unwanted material
words.definitionTh: ตัวกรอง / กรอง
words.example: The software filters invalid readings.

words.definitionEn: money charged as punishment; to charge such money
words.definitionTh: ค่าปรับ / ปรับ
words.example: The regulator may impose a fine.

words.definitionEn: a portable gun
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “firearm”.

words.definitionEn: a person trained to put out fires
words.definitionTh: นักดับเพลิง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “firefighter”.

words.definitionEn: an explosive device producing light and color
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “firework”.

words.definitionEn: strong, stable, and unlikely to change
words.example: Tighten the mount until it is firm.

words.definitionEn: in a strong or definite way
words.definitionTh: อย่างมั่นคง
words.example: Fix the camera firmly to the frame.

words.definitionEn: relating to government revenue and spending
words.definitionTh: ทางการคลัง
words.example: The project spans two fiscal years.

words.definitionEn: the way something fits or a sudden attack of emotion
words.example: Check the fit between the bracket and sensor.

words.definitionEn: the particular taste of food or drink
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “flavor”.

words.definitionEn: a weakness or fault in something
words.definitionTh: ข้อบกพร่อง
words.example: The review found a flaw in the design.

words.definitionEn: containing a weakness or error
words.definitionTh: มีข้อบกพร่อง
words.example: The first scoring method was flawed.

words.definitionEn: to escape from danger or an unwanted situation
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “flee”.

words.definitionEn: a group of ships, vehicles, or aircraft
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “fleet”.

words.definitionEn: the soft substance of a human or animal body
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “flesh”.

words.definitionEn: the ability to bend or adapt easily
words.definitionTh: ความยืดหยุ่น
words.example: Modular wiring improves flexibility.

words.definitionEn: to grow or develop successfully
words.definitionTh: เจริญรุ่งเรือง
words.example: Innovation can flourish with good data.

words.definitionEn: a liquid or gas that can flow
words.example: Monitor the fluid temperature continuously.

words.definitionEn: having a warm liking for someone or something
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “fond”.

words.definitionEn: a person who behaves without good judgment
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “fool”.

words.definitionEn: recorded video material
words.example: Review the recorded inspection footage.

words.definitionEn: to order someone not to do something
words.example: The procedure forbids bypassing the interlock.

words.definitionEn: a prediction of future conditions; to predict
words.definitionTh: การพยากรณ์ / พยากรณ์
words.example: The model forecasts storage demand.

words.definitionEn: a person who comes from another country
words.definitionTh: ชาวต่างชาติ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “foreigner”.

words.definitionEn: to create a strong relationship or shape metal
words.definitionTh: หลอม / สร้าง
words.example: The teams forged a strong partnership.

words.definitionEn: the arrangement or structure of information
words.example: Save the results in JSON format.

words.definitionEn: the process of forming or being formed
words.example: The image shows ice formation on the lens.

words.definitionEn: in the past; previously
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “formerly”.

words.definitionEn: a mathematical rule or fixed method
words.example: Use the formula to calculate capacity.

words.definitionEn: to develop a plan or express something precisely
words.example: Formulate a data-driven recommendation.

words.definitionEn: outward or forward from a starting point
words.definitionTh: ออกไป / ต่อไป
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “forth”.

words.definitionEn: planned or expected to happen soon
words.definitionTh: ที่กำลังจะมาถึง
words.example: The forthcoming audit requires preparation.

words.definitionEn: having good luck
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “fortunate”.

words.definitionEn: a place or meeting for public discussion
words.example: Share the findings in the technical forum.

words.definitionEn: preserved remains or traces of ancient life
words.definitionTh: ซากดึกดำบรรพ์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “fossil”.

words.definitionEn: to encourage the development of something
words.example: The project fosters continuous improvement.

words.definitionEn: the supporting base or fundamental principle
words.example: Reliable data is the foundation of the model.

words.definitionEn: a person who establishes an organization
words.definitionTh: ผู้ก่อตั้ง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “founder”.

words.definitionEn: a small part of a whole or a numerical ratio
words.example: Only a small fraction of samples failed.

words.definitionEn: easily broken or damaged
words.example: Handle the fragile lens carefully.

words.definitionEn: a small broken or separated piece
words.example: Remove every glass fragment from the area.

words.definitionEn: a basic structure supporting a system or idea
words.example: Use the framework to evaluate each option.

words.definitionEn: a right to operate a business under an established brand
words.example: The company operates under a franchise agreement.

words.definitionEn: in an honest and direct way
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “frankly”.

words.definitionEn: deliberate deception for financial gain
words.example: The audit checks records for fraud.

words.definitionEn: without restriction or control
words.definitionTh: อย่างอิสระ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “freely”.

words.definitionEn: happening often
words.example: Frequent alarms indicate unstable settings.

words.definitionEn: a student in the first year of college
words.definitionTh: นักศึกษาปีหนึ่ง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “freshman”.

words.definitionEn: feeling annoyed because progress is blocked
words.example: The operator became frustrated by repeated faults.

words.definitionEn: causing annoyance because progress is blocked
words.definitionTh: น่าหงุดหงิด
words.example: Intermittent faults are frustrating to diagnose.

words.definitionEn: the feeling of being annoyed by blocked progress
words.definitionTh: ความหงุดหงิด
words.example: Clear guidance reduces operator frustration.

words.definitionEn: to complete a duty, promise, or requirement
words.definitionTh: ทำให้สำเร็จ
words.example: The solution must fulfill all requirements.

words.definitionEn: working the standard number of hours
words.example: A full-time engineer supports the project.

words.definitionEn: designed to work correctly for a purpose
words.example: Verify that the safety circuit is functional.

words.definitionEn: at the most basic and important level
words.definitionTh: โดยพื้นฐาน
words.example: The new approach is fundamentally different.

words.definitionEn: the organized collection of money for a cause
words.definitionTh: การระดมทุน
words.example: The team organized a fundraising event.

words.definitionEn: a ceremony for a person who has died
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “funeral”.
